opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest and back are completely covered in these red, scaly spots. It exploded overnight, and I'm terrified it's a severe allergic reaction or something contagious.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Hundreds of spots came up across my trunk in the last day or two, they're really itchy, and I'm panicking that it's a bad drug reaction or something I could pass on to other people.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 10 days ago I felt a bit run down with a mild sore throat, and around then a single bigger scaly patch came up on my left side; in the last 24-48 hours hundreds of smaller spots have suddenly erupted across my chest, back and tummy
symptom_narrative.duration: the big patch about 10 days, the widespread smaller spots only 1-2 days
symptom_narrative.character: small oval pinkish/salmon spots with a fine rim of scale just inside the edge; the first one was a larger oval scaly patch I thought was ringworm
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: moderately itchy, and the sheer number of them and how fast they came up has really frightened me
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: chest, back and tummy, and the first big patch was on my left side; my face, palms and the soles of my feet are completely clear
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the big patch first, then an explosion of the smaller ones over a day or two; the spots on my back seem to line up along the natural creases of my skin
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: a cool shower settles the itch for a little while
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: heat and sweating make it itchier and look redder
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever now, I don't feel unwell in myself, no sores in my mouth or down below, no blisters and no peeling skin, and nothing on my palms or soles
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can do everything normally, but I'm anxious and scared to be around other people in case it's catching

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: no regular medications, and I haven't started any new tablets, antibiotics or supplements recently

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I had a mild cold-type illness with a sore throat about a week and a half ago. No new medicines, no new soaps or detergents, and I haven't been travelling.

objective_data_offered.value: hundreds of small oval pinkish/salmon-coloured spots across my chest, back and tummy, each with a fine rim of scale just inside the edge; before them, a single larger (about 4 cm) oval scaly patch came up on my left side about 10 days ago
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described by the patient over video; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: the spots are on my chest, back and tummy and on my back they seem to line up along the natural skin creases; my face, the palms of my hands and the soles of my feet are completely clear, and there's nothing in my mouth or on my genitals
I look well in myself but I'm visibly anxious and keep worrying at the spots
I haven't taken my temperature but I don't feel hot, shivery or unwell
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient impression only; no thermometer reading taken

objective_data_offered.value: I felt tired with a mild sore throat about 10 days ago, like the start of a cold
